Most responsible diagnosis for inpatient: Schizophrenia spectrum and other psychotic disorders
* Percentage is calculated using all acute inpatient hospitalizations for patients experiencing homelessness in the Hospital Morbidity Database in 2022–2023.

† Other mental health disorders includes disorders such as trauma- and stressor-related disorders, obsessive–compulsive and related disorders, and some others.
